description: HuduClient.listAssetLayouts(): typed GET /api/v1/asset_layouts (id, name), short server-side cache
HuduClient.listAllArticles({page, search}): global articles (no company_id), one Hudu page per call; verify search param (?search= vs ?name=) against local instance
New endpoints propagate Phase 1 typed error kinds (auth, not-found, rate-limit 429)
asset_layout_type_map jsonb contract + repository get/set on hudu_integrations.settings
getHuduAssetLayoutMap/setHuduAssetLayoutMap actions behind EE+flag+system_settings update guard
suggestAssetTypeForLayout(name) heuristic (server/workstation/printer/mobile/network keywords, unknown fallback)
Asset layouts block in HuduIntegrationSettings: live layout list x asset-type select, heuristic prefill, explicit Save
Import resolves unconfigured layouts to asset_type 'unknown'
Pure suggestHuduAssetMappings(): serial exact 1.0 -> name exact 0.9 -> fuzzy >=0.8 (reuses huduNameSimilarity incl. suffix rules), greedy one-to-one, mapped rows/assets excluded
Empty/missing serials never produce a serial match

Asset mapping persistence on tenant_external_entity_mappings (alga_entity_type='asset', tenant_id column): set/clear/list with typed one-to-one conflict errors, metadata (hudu_asset_name, hudu_company_id, asset_layout_id/name, primary_serial, url)
getHuduAssetMappings(clientId) action: company assets (Phase 1 fetch/cache) + client's Alga assets + mapping rows + suggestions -> view model
setHuduAssetMapping/clearHuduAssetMapping actions: EE+flag guard + asset update RBAC; replace = explicit clear+set
importHuduAsset action: createAsset (name, serial_number=primary_serial, asset_type from layout map, client_id) + mapping row created atomically
asset_tag derivation: primary_serial when present and free, else hudu-<hudu asset id>; collision pre-check
Import uses the same default asset status as the manual create form
importAllUnmatchedHuduAssets action: sequential, per-item failure isolation, {created, failed} summary; asset create RBAC
Mid-batch 429 stops the batch with a typed rate-limit error + partial summary
syncHuduClientAssets action: refetch company assets, update name/serial_number on mapped Alga assets when changed (Hudu wins on synced fields only)
Sync never changes asset_type or any non-synced Alga field, never deletes assets or mappings
Stale flagging: archived/missing Hudu asset -> mapping metadata stale:true; cleared automatically on reappearance
Sync stamps last_synced_at on touched mapping rows and returns {updated, unchanged, stale} summary; asset update RBAC
Client Hudu tab Assets section becomes mapping manager: counters, per-row Alga asset picker, badges (Mapped/Suggested/Unmapped/Pending/Stale)
Staged Save/Discard bar with company-manager semantics: picker stages, Save commits, suggestions confirmed by Save, per-row dismiss/revert/unmap
Per-row Import on unmatched rows + 'Import all unmatched' with result summary; failures reported inline
'Sync from Hudu' button with last-synced timestamp and {updated, unchanged, stale} summary
Import/Sync affordances hidden without asset create/update RBAC respectively; Phase 1 empty/disconnected/error states preserved
HuduClientDocumentsSection: collapsed 'Hudu Documentation (N)' listing article name + updated_at + deep-link (link-only)
Section injected into ClientDetails documents tab via Phase 1 gate (EE+flag+connected+mapped); zero render otherwise
Hudu fetch errors isolated to the section; native documents UI unaffected
listHuduArticlesAcrossCompanies action: one Hudu page per call, search passthrough, company->client resolution via companies cache + mapping rows, full server-side guard chain
useHuduDocumentsTab gate hook (EE + flag + connected) for the Documents page
Documents page 'Hudu' tab: search box, paged table (Hudu 25/page, prev/next), resolved client name or Unmapped badge, deep-links
CE/flag-off builds show no trace of the tab and import no EE modules
All new UI strings via t(key, {defaultValue}) with keys added to en msp/integrations + msp/documents/clients namespaces as applicable
de/es/fr/it/nl/pl/pt translations for all new keys, matching established Hudu terminology per locale
huduI18n static test extended to scan the new Phase 2 components (key resolution + hardcoded-string sweep)
Every new server action enforces the guard chain (401 unauth, 403 RBAC, 404 flag-off, CE 501) server-side
Phase 1 behavior unchanged: company mapping, passwords, client tab suites stay green; no new columns on mapping table (direction-agnostic)
